title: EnrollmentBundle
description: Install-only payload the skill POSTs to the broker's POST /v1/register. Carries the Self proofs (one per age threshold, all under scope 'hearme-v1' so they share one nullifier) and the agent_key they are bound to. The broker verifies the proofs ONCE (off-chain SNARK via the self-bridge + a one-time on-chain Celo registry/root check), atomically binds nullifier↔agent_key, and returns a broker-signed DelegationToken (delegation.json). This bundle is never stored and never re-sent. See ARCHITECTURE.md §5/§8.5.

self_proofs.description: One or more SelfProofBundle objects (self.json). All must verify, share one nullifier, and be bound to agent_key.

agent_key.description: base64 of the agent's Ed25519 public key (32 bytes); equals userDefinedData inside every proof.
